perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a yellow shirt and blue dress, jumps and waves enthusiastically in front of a colorful retail pop-up store. (2) The camera follows her as she walks through different sections of the store, including a photo-taking area with character cutouts, shelves of snacks, display cases for shoes and helmets, and a rack for apparel. Frequent cuts show close-ups of specific items like popcorn, crocs, and mugs. (3) The host stands at the checkout counter, gesturing towards promotional boards that list different spending tiers. The video ends with a still shot of her posing by a character cutout.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, energetic electronic background music begins. A high-pitched female voice excitedly introduces the Hsinchu pop-up store. (2) The female narrator provides a continuous, fast-paced description of the various zones within the store, her tone remaining cheerful and welcoming. Brief sound effects (dings) accompany text overlays. (3) The background music maintains its tempo as the narrator wraps up by inviting viewers to visit, ending with the music fading out.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'Hahababy 新竹巨城快閃 3/17-3/31' (Hahababy Hsinchu Big City Pop-up 3/17-3/31). (2) Decorative/Effect Text labels for sections: '拍照打卡區' (Photo Spot), '惜福品' (Clearance), '食品專區' (Food Section), '生活用品、手作' (Lifestyle/Handmade), '鞋子專區' (Shoes), '保溫杯' (Mugs), '配件區' (Accessories). (3) Promotional Text: '$1500', '$3000', '$6000' indicating membership or discount levels.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Detailed Store Section Walkthrough -> Promotional Offer Summary -> Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main host, approximately 11 shoppers and staff visible in the background across various store sections.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long dark hair, wearing a yellow long-sleeved shirt under a light blue dress, layered with a translucent plastic vest.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A vibrant and well-lit indoor retail space within Hsinchu Big City Mall, featuring colorful 'Hahababy' branding, product displays, shelving units, and cartoon character cardboard cutouts.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Section-by-section Showcase -> Promotional Incentives -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote the limited-time Hahababy pop-up store in Hsinchu Big City Mall. The video aims to drive foot traffic by demonstrating the wide variety of lifestyle products, cute photo opportunities, and exclusive tiered shopping rewards.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The entire video is a structured tour and promotional advertisement for the Hahababy brand store.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy female hosting typical of Taiwanese lifestyle influencers; use of stylized variety-show captions.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The fast editing and beat-synced cuts are designed to maintain high engagement on social media platforms like Instagram or TikTok.
